name: Kinross Gold Corporation
description: Kinross Gold Corporation is a senior gold mining company based in Canada with a diverse portfolio of mines and projects in the United States, Brazil, Mauritania, Chile, and Canada. Founded in 1993, the company focuses on delivering value through operational excellence, balance sheet strength, and disciplined growth. Kinross is committed to responsible mining practices and maintains a strong focus on environmental stewardship and community engagement across its global operations. The company primarily produces gold and silver, leveraging its technical expertise to optimize production and extend the life of its mining assets.
